name: Bash Language Server
description: Installs bash-language-server via npm. Optionally installs shellcheck and shfmt if not already present.

version.description: Version of bash-language-server to install. Use 'latest' for the newest available.

installShellcheck.description: When true, installs shellcheck via the system package manager if shellcheck is not already on PATH.

installShellfmt.description: When true, installs shfmt via the system package manager if shfmt is not already on PATH.
